dailyNews.description: Admiral Brad Cooper says artificial intelligence is helping process data, but humans are making final decisions.

dailyNews.description: Trump insisted that the military operation had already caused extensive damage to Iranian capabilities.

dailyNews.title: US-Israel, Iran conflict: IEA to release 400 mn barrels of oil as Middle East war rattles global energy market
dailyNews.description: The International Energy Agency (IEA) on Wednesday (local time) announced that it will release 400 million barrels of oil from its emergency stockpile available to the market to address disruptions in the global energy markets stemming from the war in the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: Iran's new leader Mojtaba Khamenei injured in airstrike that killed his father: Iran’s ambassador to Cyprus
dailyNews.description: The strike occurred during US-led air operations targeting Iran, when the residential compound of the supreme leader in central Tehran was hit.

dailyNews.title: Who was Aruna Shanbaug? How her 42-year vegetative state paved way for passive euthanasia
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court rejected a plea by Shanbaug's family to end her life, and she died from pneumonia in 2015, aged 66. But it did issue a landmark opinion recognising passive euthanasia under strict safeguards and with judicial approval.

dailyNews.title: Could the US deploy troops to Iran, and how could that play out?
dailyNews.description: Experts say Iran’s vast, mountainous terrain would make invasion difficult but a small, precise mission is possible.

dailyNews.title: Middle East conflict: Is Russia helping Iran with advanced drone tactics? Here's what intel suggests
dailyNews.description: Western intelligence says Russia is helping Iran use drone warfare tactics developed in the Ukraine war to target US and Gulf interests. Shahed drones have proven effective against regional air defences, raising concerns about deeper Moscow–Tehran cooperation.

dailyNews.title: Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei Injured But 'Safe', Says President's Son
dailyNews.description: Iran's newly appointed supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, has sustained injuries but remains "safe and sound," according to the Iranian president's son.

dailyNews.title: Amazon Wins Court Order Blocking Perplexity's AI Shopping Bot
dailyNews.description: Amazon, on Monday, won a court order blocking Perplexity from deploying its artificial intelligence (AI) shopping agents on its e-commerce platform. The decision was given by a California federal...

dailyNews.title: "Shashi Tharoor Should Counsel Them": Amit Shah's Swipe At Opposition
dailyNews.description: Amit Shah slammed the Opposition for bringing a notice seeking the removal of Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla and also took a swipe at the Congress and the Leader of the Opposition (LoP) for allegedly...

dailyNews.title: Iran cannot participate in the FIFA World Cup, sports minister says
dailyNews.description: Iran says 'under no circumstances' will it participate following the US-Israeli attacks that killed its supreme leader.

dailyNews.title: Funeral held for top Iranian commanders killed in US-Israeli strikes
dailyNews.description: Thousands of people gathered in Tehran to mourn top Iranian military officials killed by US-Israeli strikes.

dailyNews.title: Middle East conflict getting wider? As US moves shifts focus, North Korea rallies behind Iran, tests missiles
dailyNews.description: Kim Jong-un later hinted that important successes were achieved in putting strategic and tactical strike capabilities into practical use and deploying them for ‘actual war’.

dailyNews.title: US-Israel-Iran conflict: Amazon, Google, Microsoft offices in Middle East under threat? IRGC releases ‘target list’
dailyNews.description: As the Iran war entered its 12th day, the IRGC threatened to target economic centres and banks linked to the US and Israel across the region. The warning came after an Israeli strike on a Tehran bank, with Iran also listing offices and infrastructure tied to major US tech firms.

dailyNews.title: Attacks from all sides: Why Iraq was dragged into US-Israel war on Iran
dailyNews.description: Iraq has seen attacks from both sides of the conflict: Iran and its proxies on the one side and the US on the other.

dailyNews.title: Homeland Security reactivates major Global Entry program for travelers amid shutdown
dailyNews.description: The Global Entry program resumes amid government shutdown as spring break travelers face massive airport delays and reported 3.5-hour wait times at major hubs.

dailyNews.title: Trump ally Clay Fuller advances in Georgia fight for MTG’s former seat
dailyNews.description: Georgia 14th Congressional District runoff features Republican Clay Fuller, backed by Trump, facing Democrat Shawn Harris April 7 after Harris led with 37% and Fuller earned 35%.

dailyNews.title: DOJ leader swats back DNC election security suit, mocks demands as kid’s ‘tooth fairy’ wish list
dailyNews.description: DOJ official mocks DNC lawsuit over election security records as "frivolous," comparing it to "tooth fairy" wishes in dismissive social media response.

dailyNews.title: Fox Nation’s ‘Jesus Crown of Thorns’ builds to explosive, betrayal-fueled finale
dailyNews.description: "Jesus Crown of Thorns" final season premieres March 13 on Fox Nation, covering Christ's final days including Judas' betrayal, the Last Supper, and trials before his crucifixion.

dailyNews.title: Canceled HGTV host Nicole Curtis faces social media storm after attempting to explain racial slur
dailyNews.description: HGTV star Nicole Curtis' bizarre explanation for using racial slur sparks fury as she claims she makes up "crazy words" like "fart digger" during radio interview.

dailyNews.title: 1 billion identity records exposed in ID verification data leak
dailyNews.description: An IDMerit data breach allegedly exposed over 203 million U.S. records containing personal details for identity verification, researchers reported.

dailyNews.title: Illegal immigrant’s two decades of unlawful votes expose the real 'threat' to democracy: Experts

dailyNews.title: How the Trump administration is justifying the war with Iran
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration briefed the Senate Armed Services Committee on Tuesday about Operation Epic Fury, but questions loom around the White House's justification for the Middle East conflict. CBS News' Aaron Navarro has more.

dailyNews.title: Trump told FIFA Iran is welcome to play in World Cup in U.S., officials say
dailyNews.description: President Trump told FIFA representatives Tuesday that Iran is welcome to play in the World Cup tournament in the United States, officials told CBS News.

dailyNews.title: Tim Scott hopes Fed Chair Powell investigation 'goes away' to clear Kevin Warsh confirmation
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump nominated Kevin Warsh to succeed Jerome Powell as Fed chair, but the process has been blocked amid a federal investigation into Powell.

dailyNews.title: Who is Markwayne Mullin? Trump ally will bring conservative immigration policies to DHS
dailyNews.description: Republicans are optimistic about Markwayne Mullin taking over the reins at DHS, while Democrats warn his tenure will be more of the same after Kristi Noem.

dailyNews.title: Anduril expands into space as defense tech angles to support Trump's Golden Dome
dailyNews.description: Anduril, founded by Oculus creator Palmer Luckey, is positioning itself to be a key player in President Trump's "Golden Dome" project.

dailyNews.title: Tillis maintains blockade on Fed pick Kevin Warsh over Powell probe
dailyNews.description: Sen. Thom Tillis met with Federal Reserve chairman nominee Kevin Warsh, who President Donald Trump wants to replace Chair Jerome Powell.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. will build first refinery in 50 years with investment from India's Reliance Industries
dailyNews.description: U.S. President said India's largest private energy company Reliance Industries is investing in a $300-billion refinery project in Texas.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.
